pages.name: Home
pages.description: Homepage introducing the metal fabrication company with quick access to products, services, and key tasks. Acts as the main entry point for browsing product categories, key services like laser cutting and emergency repair, and highlights featured structural and fabricated metal products.
primary_functions: Introduce the company, core product lines, and fabrication services.
Provide a global search bar to find products (e.g., galvanized handrail kits, aluminum sheets, steel angles, bolts).
Offer prominent navigation tiles/links into major product categories (tubing, beams, cabinets, handrails) and services (laser cutting, emergency repair).

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a featured product category tile such as 'Tubing' or 'Cabinets'.
Submit the global search bar (e.g., 'galvanized handrail kit').
Click on a featured product card in the homepage featured products section.
Click on 'View All Services' from the featured services section.
Click a homepage call-to-action like 'Laser Cutting Quote'.
Click on an 'About Our Company' teaser link.

access_methods.description: Accessed via the 'Home' link in the main header navigation.
Directly loaded at site root or index.html.

pages.name: Products Listing
pages.description: Catalog page for browsing and searching all metal products with filters and sorting. Serves as the main search results view and category listing for tubing, beams, cabinets, handrail kits, plates, sheets, angles, bolts, and other metal products.
primary_functions: Browse products by category or search term (e.g., tubing, square tubes, handrail kits, beams, cabinets, sheets, angles, bolts).
Filter products by attributes such as material (e.g., stainless steel, galvanized steel), dimensions, length, application/use (e.g., 3 steps), price, and shipping options (e.g., free shipping).
Sort products by criteria such as price (including 'Price - Low to High') to find the cheapest suitable option.
Open individual product detail pages for more information and purchasing.

incoming_params.description: Product category slug used to scope the listing (e.g., 'tubing', 'beams', 'cabinets').
Free-text search query entered in the global search bar (e.g., 'galvanized handrail kit').
Material filter (e.g., 'stainless_steel', 'galvanized_steel', 'aluminum').
Profile type filter (e.g., 'square_tube', 'hea_beam', 'handrail_kit').
Minimum unit price used to filter results.
Maximum unit price used to filter results (e.g., 80 for tubes or 250 for handrail kits).
Minimum supported steps for handrail kits, used in step-range filtering.
Maximum supported steps for handrail kits, used in step-range filtering.
When true, filters results to products eligible for free standard shipping.
Sorting option such as 'price_asc' for 'Price - Low to High'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on any product card in the listing grid or list view.
Click on a 'Configure' or 'Customize' button for a configurable cabinet product.
Click 'View Cart' after using a quick 'Add to Cart' action on a listing item.

access_methods.description: Accessed via the 'Products' link in the main header navigation.
Accessed with category and/or search query parameters from the homepage search or category tiles.
Users can directly open products.html to browse all products with default filters.

pages.name: Product Detail
pages.description: Detailed product page showing specifications, pricing, and purchase options for a single item. Supports structural products like tubes and beams, consumables like bolts, and kits like handrails.
primary_functions: Display full product specifications, pricing per unit, available lengths/sizes, materials, and suitability (e.g., 2 in x 2 in x 6 ft stainless steel tube, HEA 200 beam, handrail kits for 3 steps).
Allow users to set quantity (e.g., 6 tubes, 1 handrail kit) and add the product to the cart.
Provide access to technical resources such as 'Technical Datasheet' or 'PDF Datasheet' links for structural products like HEA beams.
Enable saving products to a wishlist or named project list (e.g., 'Project Beams') via an 'Add to Wishlist' or 'Save Product' action.

incoming_params.description: Product ID whose details should be displayed (e.g., stainless tube, HEA 200 beam, handrail kit, bolts).

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View Cart' after adding a product to the cart.
Click 'View Wishlist' after saving the product to a wishlist.
Click 'Configure this cabinet' for a configurable cabinet product.

access_methods.description: Accessed via product.html?id={productId} when a product is selected from listings, wishlists, or cart.
Deep-linked from external sources directly to a specific product detail page.

pages.name: Shopping Cart
pages.description: Page summarizing selected products before checkout. Supports both simple catalogue items and configured cabinet products.
primary_functions: Display all items added to the cart, including configured products, with quantities, unit prices, and totals.
Allow users to change quantities (e.g., set configured cabinet quantity to 2), remove items, and update the cart.
Provide order subtotal and estimated totals and a clear call-to-action to proceed to checkout.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the 'Proceed to Checkout' button.
Click 'Continue Shopping' link.
Click on a product name or image in the cart to review its details.

access_methods.description: Accessed via the 'Cart' link or cart icon in the header.
Users can directly open cart.html to review current cart contents from local session state.

pages.name: Checkout
pages.description: Checkout flow including shipping selection for product orders. Provides address entry, shipping method selection, and order summary review.
primary_functions: Collect necessary customer and shipping address details for the order.

Present available shipping methods with prices and delivery estimates, allowing selection of the cheapest option that delivers within a required timeframe (e.g., within 33 business days or 5 days or less).
Display an order summary for review before completing the purchase.

incoming_params.description: Optional step indicator for multi-step checkout (e.g., 'shipping', 'review').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a 'Back to Cart' link from the checkout page.
Click 'View full shipping policy' near the shipping methods list.

access_methods.description: Reached after the user submits the 'Proceed to Checkout' action from the cart.
Advanced users can re-open checkout.html to resume an in-progress checkout session.

pages.name: Services Overview
pages.description: Overview page listing all fabrication and repair services offered, including laser cutting, custom cutting, and emergency/on-site repair.
primary_functions: List key services such as Laser Cutting, Emergency Repair, Custom Cutting, and other fabrication services with short descriptions.

Provide navigation links into detailed service pages (service_detail.html with appropriate serviceId parameters, e.g., service_detail.html?serviceId=laser_cutting or service_detail.html?serviceId=emergency_repair).

incoming_params.description: Optional serviceId to visually highlight a specific service in the list (e.g., 'laser_cutting').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Laser Cutting' card or 'Learn more' in its tile.
Click 'Emergency Repair' card or 'Learn more' in its tile.
Click 'Custom Cutting' card or 'Learn more' link.

access_methods.description: Accessed via the 'Services' link in the main header navigation.
Directly accessed at services.html for an overview of service capabilities.

pages.name: Service Detail
pages.description: Detailed service page providing information and a request/quote form for a specific service such as laser cutting or emergency repair.
primary_functions: Describe the selected service in detail (e.g., laser cutting capabilities, supported materials and thicknesses, emergency repair regions and response times).
Provide service-specific controls such as region selectors for emergency repair (e.g., choosing 'Midwest') or guidelines for entering dimensions for laser cutting.
Offer a prominent call-to-action button (e.g., 'Request a Quote', 'Request Service', 'Book Repair') that focuses or scrolls to an embedded request/quote form on the same page.

Capture and submit service request details, including technical information (e.g., material = steel, thickness = 10 mm, dimensions 1000 mm x 500 mm, quantity = 15, tolerance = �10.5 mm), priority or response time (e.g., 'Within 24 hours'), issue descriptions, location (ZIP and country), and contact information (name, email, phone, site address).

incoming_params.description: Service identifier determining which service to display (e.g., 'laser_cutting', 'emergency_repair').
Optional action hint such as 'quote' or 'request' used to focus the quote or request form on load.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to all services' breadcrumb link.

access_methods.description: Accessed as service_detail.html?serviceId={serviceId} from the Services overview or homepage CTAs.
Can be directly linked from marketing campaigns to a specific service detail page.

pages.name: Product Configurator
pages.description: Interactive configurator for customizable products such as metal storage cabinets. Allows users to define dimensions, color, shelving, and locking options and see pricing before adding to cart.
primary_functions: Allow users to configure cabinet parameters including height (around 2000 mm), width (at least 900 mm), depth (e.g., 450500 mm), color (e.g., Light Grey RAL 7035), number of shelves (e.g., 4), and options like lockable doors.
Display real-time pricing for the configured product and allow users to adjust optional add-ons or extras to keep the unit price under a target budget (e.g., under $600).
Add the configured cabinet as a unique line item to the shopping cart for further quantity adjustments and checkout.

incoming_params.description: ID of the base cabinet product to configure; when omitted, user may first choose from a list of base cabinets.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View Cart' or 'Go to Cart' after adding a configured cabinet to the cart.
Click 'Back to cabinets' from the configurator.

access_methods.description: Typically opened as configurator.html?baseProductId={productId} from a cabinet product detail or listing.
Can be accessed directly to select a base cabinet within the configurator itself.

pages.name: About Us
pages.description: Company information page describing background, capabilities, and team. Provides overview of fabrication expertise and links to facilities and tours.
primary_functions: Present company history, mission, certifications, and high-level overview of metal fabrication and product offerings.
Provide clear links to related pages such as Our Facilities and Factory Tours for users interested in visiting the factory.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Our Facilities' link within the About Us content.
Click a call-to-action like 'Schedule a Factory Tour'.

access_methods.description: Accessed through the 'About' link in the main header navigation.
Accessible via the 'About Us' footer link.

pages.name: Our Facilities
pages.description: Overview of the manufacturing facilities, equipment, and capabilities. Used by visitors evaluating the factory or planning onsite visits.
primary_functions: Showcase factory layout, machinery, production lines, and safety standards to build trust in fabrication capabilities.
Offer a clear call-to-action link or button to access detailed Factory Tours information and booking (factory_tours.html).

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Factory Tours', 'Schedule a Visit', or similar call-to-action button.
Click 'Back to About Us' link.

access_methods.description: Accessed via the 'Our Facilities' footer link.
Can be directly loaded at facilities.html from external references.

pages.name: Factory Tours
pages.description: Information and booking interface for factory tours and group visits. Supports booking requests like weekday group tours at specific times.
primary_functions: Explain available tour types, safety requirements, and typical schedule for factory visits.
Provide a 'Factory Tours', 'Book a Tour', or 'Request a Visit' call-to-action that opens or scrolls to an embedded booking/contact form.

Capture tour request details including preferred weekday date (e.g., within the next calendar month), preferred time (e.g., 10:00 AM), group size (e.g., 4 visitors), visitor name, email, and a short message, and submit the tour request.

incoming_params.description: Optional ISO date string used to prefill the preferred date field in the tour request form.
Optional time string (e.g., '10:00 AM') to prefill the time field.
Optional group size to prefill the 'Number of Visitors' field.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'About Us' breadcrumb or contextual link.
Click 'Learn more about our facilities' link.

access_methods.description: Accessed via the 'Factory Tours' footer link.
Directly loaded at factory_tours.html from invitations or facility pages.

pages.name: Wishlist
pages.description: Page for viewing and managing saved products and project lists. Used to store items like HEA beams for later reference or ordering.
primary_functions: Display all products the user has saved (such as structural steel HEA 200 beams) in a default or user-named list (e.g., 'Project Beams').
Allow users to move items from wishlist to cart, remove saved items, and, when saving products, choose or name the list into which items should be stored.

incoming_params.description: Optional wishlist identifier specifying which list to open (e.g., a 'Project Beams' list for saved HEA beams).

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a saved product name or image to view its details.
Click 'Move to Cart' for a wishlist item and then 'View Cart'.
Click 'Browse products' link from an empty wishlist state.

access_methods.description: Accessed via the 'Wishlist' link in the site footer.
Users can open wishlist.html to see their default wishlist or a specific list via wishlistId.

pages.name: Policies
pages.description: Consolidated information on shipping, returns, and legal policies. Includes shipping delivery windows and free-shipping conditions relevant to product and service orders.
primary_functions: Present shipping policies including typical delivery windows (e.g., options like economy 35 business days) and conditions for free standard shipping.
Outline returns, warranty, terms of use, and privacy information relevant to product purchases and service requests.

incoming_params.description: Optional policy document code used to focus a specific section, e.g., 'shipping_policy', 'returns_policy'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to Checkout' link shown when the user arrives from checkout.

access_methods.description: Accessed via the 'Policies' footer link.
Can be opened directly at policies.html, optionally with a doc parameter to highlight a specific policy.

header_links.description: Browse all metal products and components
View fabrication and repair services, including laser cutting and emergency repair
Learn about the company and its facilities
View and update items in your shopping cart

footer_links.description: Information about manufacturing facilities and capabilities
Factory tour details and booking form
List of available fabrication and repair services
View and manage saved products and project lists
Shipping, returns, and legal policy information
